players.name: Laura Ziegler
players.injury_comment: Ziegler will be held out Monday in an effort to preserve her eligibility as a developmental player. Her next chance to take the court will arrive Wednesday against the Lynx.

home.starter_source: live ESPN roster/stat/injury APIs; starters inferred by live minutes + production

players.name: Ashten Prechtel
players.injury_comment: Prechtel wasn't included on the initial injury report but will sit out Monday's contest to preserve her eligibility while signed to a developmental contract. Her next opportunity to play will come Wednesday against the Wings.

players.name: Iliana Rupert
players.injury_comment: Rupert signed a multi-year contract with Golden State during the offseason and missed the start of training camp due to an overseas commitment. Her status for the 2026 regular season now appears to be in jeopardy due to her pregnancy. The 24-year-old made 21 regular-season appearances (11 starts) for the Valkyries last year and averaged 9.3 points, 3.9 rebounds and 1.6 assists in 23.1 minutes per game. If Rupert is sidelined in 2026, Janelle Salaun, Kiah Stokes and Laeticia Amihere are candidates to see increased work.

players.name: Miela Sowah
players.injury_comment: Sowah hasn't appeared in a game since May 21, and she'll be held out again Monday in an effort to preserve her eligibility as a developmental player. Her next chance to play will arrive Wednesday against the Wings.
